name: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd
description: Motilal Oswal Financial Services, founded in 1987 by Motilal Oswal and Raamdeo Agrawal, has evolved from a research-driven equity broking house into one of India's most comprehensive financial services platforms. The company spans Capital Markets, Asset & Wealth Management, Housing Finance, and Alternative Investments, serving over 1,600,000 customers across 550+ cities through 2,500+ business locations. Research coverage of 300+ companies remains the firm's enduring competitive moat.
